notes: Input/trigger blocks. Both entries are currently placeholders in the Early Access vertical slice — the wiki explicitly says 'This block does not have any functionality yet. It will be added in a later vertical slice.' — so they are modeled with gameStatus='planned'. Cockpits, seats, and control seats live in blocks/cockpits.json. Terminals (Contract, Trade) and doors are intentionally not in this file yet.

resources.description: Single-input button block. Placeholder — functionality not yet implemented in the current vertical slice.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds
dataGaps: functionality (wiki: 'does not have any functionality yet; will be added in a later vertical slice')
